scripts.test: node scripts/run-python.js -m pytest back && node scripts/run-python.js -m pytest sim
scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage run --source=back -m pytest back && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage run --append --source=sim -m pytest sim && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage report && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage html
scripts.test:coverage-check: node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage run --source=back -m pytest back && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage run --append --source=sim -m pytest sim && node scripts/run-python.js -m coverage report --fail-under=70
scripts.lint: node scripts/run-python.js -m flake8 back sim && node scripts/run-python.js -m black --check back sim && node scripts/run-python.js -m mypy back sim && cd cdk && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.format: npm run lint:fix && cd front && npm run format && cd ../cdk && npm run format && cd ..
scripts.validate: npm run validate:init && npm run validate:licenses && npm run validate:branch
scripts.ci:test: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage
scripts.dev:services: npm run graphhopper:prepare && npm run graphhopper:up && docker-compose up -d postgres && node scripts/wait-for-health.js velosim-postgres && node scripts/wait-for-health.js velosim-graphhopper 300
scripts.dev: npm run dev:services && concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
